shorts.title: Local leaders plan ahead with new zoning rules
shorts.title_distilled: Local leaders plan ahead with new zoning rules.
shorts.description: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Leaders in one Lackawanna County Township are planning before big tech or energy projects ever arrive. A new zoning update could shape what gets built and where. Scott Township leaders are moving to update zoning rules to allow solar farms and large data centers, but only under strict conditions. [...]
shorts.content: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Leaders in one Lackawanna County Township are planning before big tech or energy projects ever arrive. A new zoning update could shape what gets built and where. Scott Township leaders are moving to update zoning rules to allow solar farms and large data centers, but only under strict conditions.
